title: Peer evaluators cannot use the Send Email feature — rules block their template read
Cancelling a window strands booked slots/invitees and sends no cancellation emails despite UI claiming it does
Deleting a booked Draft observation strands the slot, ledger, invitee state, and Google Calendar events
Evaluator can be double-booked across overlapping windows (busy ledger is per-window only)
Transcription job status/failures never reach the UI — failed jobs spin forever
Deactivating, deleting, retyping, or re-typing a question silently hides or rewrites historical answers
Deleting a section strands its items — invisible on the module page but still served as dashboard to-dos
Finalized Work Product / Instructional Round observations are hardcoded to null in the dashboard context
Observers (non-admin Peer Evaluators) are shown Drive links they cannot open
'Disable new observation creation' toggle is a no-op
Window-expiry emails go to ALL invitees, including those who booked
Day-preference assignment can book past slots; UI shows past/lead-time-violating slots as available
Every section edit rewrites the whole sections array; the debounced rich-text flush uses a stale mount-time closure that can silently wipe newer section changes
Most callables gate 'admin' on the role slug only, ignoring the isAdmin/hasSpecialAccess claims that rules, storage and UI honor
Empty role/year mapping means 'nothing assigned' in the editor but 'render everything' in the PDF
Role 'Special access' checkbox does nothing — access is hardcoded to three role slugs
Template 'recipient' setting is ignored by every trigger except scheduled.preObservation
Scheduled time and sign-up details captured at booking are never displayed anywhere
Audio playback and transcripts vanish from the app once an observation is finalized
Material ctaUrl is schema-defined and half-consumed but cannot be set anywhere and never actually renders as a CTA
Branding primary color is configurable but never themes the app
signupSlotBooked step event regresses when the window fills or expires
inviteSentAt is stamped even when no active invite template exists (nothing was sent)
No way to reopen a finalized observation or regenerate its PDF
Work Product / Instructional Round staff responses are absent from the finalized PDF
No way to create a rubric anywhere in the admin UI
Finalized observations render against the live rubric — later edits silently rewrite or hide scored data in-app
Failed upload permanently loses the recording — no retry, no download fallback, no unload guard
Default-bitrate recordings hit the 32 MiB upload cap around 30 minutes — full-length observations rejected
No rescheduling exists anywhere; updateObservationEvent is dead code and edited dates silently desync
No window detail view: PE cannot see who booked what, cancel a single booking, or resend invites
isActive=false and hasPage=false are only enforced in the sidebar — page stays reachable, chips still render, and draft materials leak onto staff dashboards
Deleting a module orphans its items subcollection, staff assignments, and progress docs — orphaned materials keep appearing as ghost dashboard tasks
Pre/post observation meeting notes never appear in the PDF
No toast infrastructure — failed writes across dashboard and admin pages are silent
Bulk edit can create year/summativeYear combinations the single-row editors forbid
No school-year rollover tool — annual year/cycle advancement is manual and error-prone
Evidence files and audio recordings cannot be removed from a draft
Observation creation, admin edits, and deletion are never audit-logged
Admins cannot edit, finalize, or delete another PE's observation from the UI despite server-side permission
Acknowledgement state is invisible everywhere except the staff member's own dashboard
Autosave is whole-draft last-writer-wins — two open sessions silently destroy each other's work
Transcripts are a dead end — no insertion into the observation script (UI copy even claims otherwise)
Connecting Google Calendar after booking never creates the missed events
Bell-schedule changes under a booked slot only write an audit warning — observation, calendar events, and people are never updated
Resource fileUrl exists in schema and renderer but there is no file upload — resources are external-link-only despite Drive being the app's blob store
Items have an order field but no reorder UI, and order values collide after deletions
Email delivery failures are invisible — audit log records 'sent' at enqueue time
First sign-in without a staff record dead-ends silently; no admin visibility or request path
Renaming a building silently orphans every staff building assignment
Audit log admin view has no filtering, search, sort, or export
Observed staff can read full Draft observation content (evaluator's in-progress notes), while the rules' own doc says Finalized-only
Rate-limit settings (saves/min, uploads/hr, transcriptions/day) have no enforcement
Transcription pipeline ignores observation status — worker mutates finalized observations and diverges from the PDF
Finalize flow has no completeness validation or warning
Scheduling-created Draft observations also fire generic 'observation created' emails (double email)
requireCalendarConnect is bypassed by the day-preference flow and surfaces only as a server error in direct booking
Day-preference staff cannot withdraw a preference, and have no cancel button after assignment
No reminder email nudges invitees who haven't booked before the window closes
Rules let the observer raw-write/delete window docs (ledger, tokens, dayCounts) and expose all invitees' tokens to every invitee
Observer/Peer Evaluator names render as email localparts instead of admin-entered staff names
Add-staff form accepts non-domain emails and silently overwrites existing records
Staff invite email only fires on doc creation — no resend action, no invite on reactivation, and cutover import will mass-send
My Staff caseload does not reflect role-year mappings (the configured 'who is evaluated' matrix)
Only the most recent draft WP/IR observation is answerable — a second active one dead-ends
Role's rubricId is free text with no existence validation — a typo silently breaks the whole rubric chain for that role
Deleting a role breaks rubric resolution for its staff and all historical observations, with no in-use guard
Question bank shows a drag handle but has no reordering at all, and order numbers can collide
Module page rich-text content is readable by every signed-in staff member, not just assigned staff
Admins cannot preview the staff-facing module page — drafts (hasPage=false) are blocked even for admins and the builder has no preview affordance
Rich-text sections support no images, video embeds, or tables — text/links only
Creating a module with an existing ID silently merges into (and partially overwrites) the existing module
Non-Orono Google accounts are signed out silently with no explanation, and the orphan Auth user is left behind
Role / admin-access / activation changes never reach the audit log
Staff dashboard drops every listener error and renders a plausible-but-wrong empty state
Per-component evidence attachments are not listed in the PDF
Slot generation/booking never consults the evaluator's actual Google Calendar availability
Security admin email is collected but no security alert ever sends
Session duration setting never enforced
Required/typed signup-field answers are not validated server-side
Building schedule 'Schedule active' toggle is never consumed
createObservationWindow doesn't enforce allowedBookingModes, past dates, or signupFieldIds validity server-side
PE is never notified when staff submit day preferences
Variable catalog drift: vars sent but not insertable ({{staffYear}}), vars listed but misleading ({{assignedDomainList}}), chips missing available vars
Multiple active templates per trigger silently pick an arbitrary winner; system-template integrity is UI-only
No admin visibility into transcription jobs despite rules and data supporting it
No per-staff opt-out from an auto-enabled module — the rule always wins
Draft observations keep stale role/year snapshots after admin corrects the staff record
Hero 'Cycle close' date is hardcoded to May 15
Sign-in screen ignores admin branding despite the admin UI claiming otherwise
Branding assets not applied to document title, favicon, or top-nav primary logo
Editor rubric lookup lacks the legacy displayName fallback the server has
Failed finalize leaves an orphan PDF in Drive and the folder shared with the observed staff member while the doc reverts to Draft
Dashboard settings (and other admin drafts) lose unsaved edits on navigation with no warning
Dashboard checkpoint cards render enabled CTA buttons that do nothing
Dashboard CTAs to internal routes trigger full page reloads
Module tasks: no overdue state, no completion date, no undo from the dashboard
Question bank edits write to Firestore on every keystroke with no error handling and no delete confirmation
Rubric editor saves without validating against the shared schema
Domains can never be deleted and components/domains can't be reordered; rubric display name is not editable
Module and item writes bypass the Zod schemas — empty-string URLs/dates, null updatedBy, and unbounded titles produce schema-invalid docs
Signup fields cannot be reordered and order values collide after deletes
My Staff table shows raw role slugs and swallows load errors
Staff person page gives no archived indicator and allows new observations on inactive staff
Staff directory lacks building and cycle filters for multi-building caseloads
Audio playback requires a manual full download — no streaming, Range support, or metadata
Demoting or archiving a privileged user leaves their old admin/PE token valid for up to an hour
Domain enforcement never checks email_verified — rules and claim-minting trust any token whose email string matches
pdf-renderer workspace has zero tests and is silently skipped by the monorepo test gate
Default 'Review the draft' dashboard step tells staff they can comment — no commenting feature exists
Admin settings pages persist unvalidated values (no Zod parse before write, no rules validation)
Dashboard config and quick materials save without schema validation
No roster export from the Staff admin table
Incomplete WP/IR reminder re-sends every single day forever with no cap
Deleting a rubric component leaves orphaned IDs in roleYearMappings forever
Local dev-auth-server mints live-project tokens for any email and permanently creates verified Auth users
Every render fetches Google Fonts over the network; image carries an unused firebase-admin dependency; undefined CSS variable
uploadAudio trusts client-supplied MIME type — arbitrary content lands in observation Drive folders
transcriptionJobs documents accumulate forever with no retention or cascade on observation delete
Catch-all 404 renders outside the auth shell: unauthenticated visitors see 'Page not found' instead of sign-in, signed-in users lose the app chrome
Sidebar 'My Rubric' domain links go nowhere when the domain has no assigned components
componentTags and scratchNotes schema fields are written empty and never used
Daily reminder job's queries have no composite indexes — pre-observation and incomplete-WP/IR reminders can never send in production
All PDFs/audio/evidence live in the service account's fixed ~15 GB My Drive — uploads and finalization will hard-fail once it fills, and no Shared Drive support exists (supportsAllDrives never set)
Booking transaction commits before the Draft observation exists — a post-transaction failure strands the invitee as 'booked' with no observation and no retry path
Admins have zero visibility into module completion — moduleProgress is written by staff but no admin report, per-module roster, or per-staff drill-in exists anywhere
No Firestore offline persistence — a WiFi drop or tab reload mid-observation on the classroom iPad loses queued scripting/scoring writes silently
Observed staff have no in-app list of their own finalized observations — history is only reachable via old emails or Drive
No reminder for unacknowledged finalized observations — acknowledgement, the cycle's final step, has no nudge and no trigger type
Documented emulator seed does not exist — pnpm dev:emulators imports ./fixtures/seed, but fixtures/ is empty and nothing is tracked in git
Playwright E2E suite is empty and never runs in CI — pnpm test:e2e (advertised in CLAUDE.md with desktop+iPad projects) has zero specs
No Firestore backup, export, or disaster-recovery posture anywhere in the repo — evaluation records have no documented recovery path
